message:
Multi-module cleanup: memory safety, lock handling, indentation, and API refinements

runtime.rs:
- Remove Arc<Mutex<StorageHandle>> indirection: StorageHandle is now
  passed and cloned directly (it already wraps Arc internally). This
  eliminates a redundant mutex layer and simplifies 12+ call sites.
- Change config_take_update receiver from & to &mut (required by
  borrow_and_clone on the asupersync-runtime path).
- Fix ~15 lines of broken indentation (8-space indents collapsed to
  correct 4-space alignment) in maintenance, discovery, and capture tasks.
- Remove trailing blank lines and redundant drop() calls.
- Update take_storage() return type and doc comments on both
  ObservationRuntime and RuntimeHandle.

storage.rs:
- Upgrade four deferred transaction sites to IMMEDIATE mode to prevent
  SQLITE_BUSY under concurrent readers: record_usage_metrics_batch,
  consume_prepared_plan, consume_approval_token, and
  consume_approval_token_by_code.

sessionhandler.rs:
- Replace two .lock().unwrap() calls on per-pane Mutex with
  .lock().map_err() returning anyhow error, preventing panics on
  poisoned locks.
- Guard against stale window IDs in ListPanes: use if-let + continue
  instead of unwrap() on mux.get_window().
- Minor formatting (line-break in error string, trailing comma).

cass.rs, caut.rs, wezterm.rs:
- Truncate stderr bytes BEFORE String::from_utf8_lossy conversion to
  prevent allocating multi-megabyte strings from runaway child processes.
- In caut.rs, check raw byte length before allocating string for stdout
  (prevents OOM on huge outputs).

differential_snapshot.rs:
- Fix else-if to separate if for Scrollback dirty field check. The
  previous else-if meant scrollback-only changes on already-dirty panes
  would be silently dropped.

process_tree.rs:
- Map Linux state "I" (idle kernel thread) to Sleeping alongside "S".
- Map macOS state 'I' (idle) to Sleeping alongside 'S'.

search_bridge.rs:
- Replace 1ms busy-spin loops with park_timeout(10ms) in cancellation
  and timeout watcher threads to reduce CPU waste.
- Extract BRIDGE_WATCH_POLL_INTERVAL constant.

spsc_ring_buffer.rs:
- Add Drop impls for SpscConsumer and SpmcConsumer that set closed flag
  and notify all waiters, preventing producer hangs on dropped consumers.
- Rename consumer_index() to id() on SpmcConsumer for API consistency.

egress_tap_integration.rs:
- Add mut to 5 mpsc::Receiver bindings to satisfy updated channel API
  requirements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
